content: ADP and ATP differ in the number of
explanation:
ADP (adenosine diphosphate) and ATP (adenosine triphosphate) differ in the number of phosphate units. Therefore, the correct option is:

Option A: phosphate units

ATP contains three phosphate groups ($$\text{-P-P-P}$$), while ADP contains two phosphate groups ($$\text{-P-P}$$). The conversion between ADP and ATP involves the addition or removal of a phosphate group, which plays a critical role in energy transfer within cells.
